The '''''Defiant''''' was an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]]. The ''Defiant'' first saw service in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Republic Navy/Legends|Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], where it was adorned with lateral red markings port and starboard of the centerline and wore the symbol of the [[Open Circle Fleet/Legends|Open Circle Fleet]].<ref name="SWPMTCG:CW" /> It later served in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], by which time it had its markings removed.<ref name="SW:EAW" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' film]]
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
